Authors and Citation

Citation

Source: inst/CITATION

Zeng D, Fang Y, Luo P, Qiu W, Wang S, Shen R, Gu W, Huang X, Mao Q, Lai Y, Xu X, Shi M, Yu G, Liao W (2024). “IOBR2: Multidimensional Decoding of Tumor Microenvironment for Immuno-Oncology Research.” bioRxiv. doi:10.1101/2024.01.13.575484, preprint (which was not certified by peer review) is the author/funder, who has granted bioRxiv a license to display the preprint in perpetuity. It is made available under a CC-BY-NC-ND 4.0 International license.
